message:
feat(fastapi-http): implement keep-alive timeout for idle connections

- Add ServerError::KeepAliveTimeout variant for timeout expiry
- Implement read_with_timeout() with deadline-based polling
- Update handle_connection() to use keep_alive_timeout from config
- Add tests for timeout behavior and deadline calculation

Idle connections now timeout after keep_alive_timeout (default 75s).
Set Duration::ZERO to disable timeout.

Closes: bd-gw1u
Unblocks: bd-1ner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -379,7 +379,7 @@ pub fn route_impl(method: &str, attr: TokenStream, item: TokenStream) -> TokenSt
         #[doc(hidden)]
         #[allow(non_snake_case)]
         pub fn #route_fn_name() -> fastapi_router::Route {
-            fastapi_router::Route::new(
+            fastapi_router::Route::with_placeholder_handler(
                 fastapi_core::Method::#method_ident,
                 #path_str,
             )
